zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Richards於1495年出生在英國薩默塞特阿勒時，她的父親John Richards30歲，母親Agnes Wells38歲。她於1514年之前與Richard Pawle結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1549年在英國薩默塞特享年54歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特陶頓。

nameMeanings.name: Richards
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Richard , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Rickards .
German: patronymic from the personal name   Richard  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Richards was born in 1495, in Aller, Somerset, England, her father, John Richards, was 30 and her mother, Agnes Wells, was 38. She married Richard Pawle before 1514. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1549, in Somerset, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Taunton, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Richards est née en 1495, à Aller, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John Richards, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes Wells, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Pawle avant 1514. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1549, à Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Richards(이)가 1495년 영국 서머세트 앨러에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Richards(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Wells(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1514년 이전 Richard Pawle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1549년 영국 서머세트에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 타운턴에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Richard Pawle antes 1514. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1549, em Somerset, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Richards родилась в 1495 г. в местности аллир, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени John Richards было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Wells, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Pawle перед 1514 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1549 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия.
